name: pr_cep_acc_drain_updel_k2
drl: rule W when A() accumulate( E(tag == "x"); $c : count() ) then end
_finding: D-160 (the k=2 cell): update-admits-then-delete of an evented plain-acc source under a real join left (A() accumulate(E)) - the net-zero re-fire re-emits through every left tuple (oracle 2 firings). Pins the drain's force-re-emission walking node lefts, not just the InitialFact shape.
